quotes.text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
quotes.author: Alan Kay

quotes.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
quotes.author: Arthur C. Clarke

quotes.text: Intelligence is the ability to adapt to change.
quotes.author: Stephen Hawking

quotes.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
quotes.author: Edward Teller

quotes.text: Programs must be written for people to read, and only incidentally for machines to execute.
quotes.author: Harold Abelson

quotes.text: First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.
quotes.author: John Johnson

quotes.text: Talk is cheap. Show me the code.
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: The most powerful tool we have as developers is automation.
quotes.author: Scott Hanselman

quotes.text: Every great developer you know got there by solving problems they were unqualified to solve until they did it.
quotes.author: Patrick McKenzie

quotes.text: It always seems impossible until it's done.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.text: Machines take me by surprise with great frequency.
quotes.author: Alan Turing

quotes.text: AI is probably the most important thing humanity has ever worked on.
quotes.author: Sundar Pichai

quotes.text: The goal of AI is not to replace human intelligence, but to augment it.
quotes.author: Fei-Fei Li

quotes.text: Data is the new oil. AI is the new electricity.
quotes.author: Andrew Ng

quotes.text: We are at the beginning of a new era in computing, where intelligence is ubiquitous.
quotes.author: Jensen Huang

quotes.text: Build things that matter. Ship things that work. Learn things that last.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci

quotes.text: Code is like humor. When you have to explain it, it's bad.
quotes.author: Cory House

quotes.text: Learning never exhausts the mind.
quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci

quotes.text: The more I learn, the more I realize how much I don't know.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Engineering is not only study of 45 subjects but it is moral studies of intellectual life.
quotes.author: Prakhar Srivastav

quotes.text: What you build defines who you become.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Consistency beats talent when talent isn't consistent.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: The future belongs to those who learn, build, and ship.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Make it work, make it right, make it fast.
quotes.author: Kent Beck

quotes.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
quotes.author: Sam Levenson

quotes.text: Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out.
quotes.author: Robert Collier

quotes.text: A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
quotes.author: Mark Twain
